stemHtml: The pilot of a single engine piston aircraft on an IFR flight experiences an engine failure. He/she has just finished transmitting a distress message to Bern radar, which has been acknowledged already. The pilot suddenly hears the following transmission from Bern radar: "All stations stop transmitting, mayday". What does this mean to him/her?

options.a: He/she should stop transmitting until he/she hears the message "Distress traffic ended" on the frequency.
options.b: He/she should continue talking to Bern radar and provide updates on his/her intentions.
options.c: He/she should stop transmitting until all other aircraft have left the frequency.
options.d: Only if the situation becomes worse should he/she continue talking to Bern radar.
